roa.docketEntryComment: /AJW/CH1:ISS:PROB 2 Y:PJ 7D/CTS: 7/4019HALF/WS/DNACOMP/PPRFCOMP/DEF:SHALLOBEY THE PREVIOUSLY ISSUED STAY AWAY ORDER/IND/VF4:300/PROBREVFN/COA:40/ICNA/CTORD:FINES AND FEES SUSPENDED/OBEY/ACCEP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/X:THE PEOPLE'S ORAL MOTION TO ADD COUNT 4, A FELONY CHARGE OF 32PC, IS GRANTED/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV & PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF G/DEFT ADV RTS:4/FNDG/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/PRES:10-04-19/PPRF/REMA/ARBUCKLE/IBARRA/DOP/INTC/CTORD:THAT THE GPS DEVICE BE REMOVED FROM THE DEFENDANT/

/CAL: TO SET PX/INTC/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL  MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/CTORD: ABIDE BY STAY AWAY ORDER/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: TO SET AND JOIN CO DEFON 07-11-19 & PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 07-22-19/DOP/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/PD/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:07-23-19/987,2/BAIL:15000/X: BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/SAORD/SA2: INTERSECTION OF GOLDEN GATE AND HYDE STREETS, SF/SAORD3/CONTD: TS PX AND ADDRESS CUSTODY STATUS ON 07-10-19 /DOP/
/CAL:TO SET & JOIN CO DEFT/X:7-22-19 DATE IS CONFIRMED/
